I never got a refund..

title: Nicole Elder
text: Nothing but a scam. I cancelled my subscription MONTHS ago, and they are still taking $65CAD out of my account. I cancelled it through the Google Play store, it no longer shows as a subscription, and yet they're still taking the payment monthly. I have no way of cancelling it through their app, and there has been no response to the email I sent to the email address they keep posting on other reviews to reach out to. Nothing but a scam, don't even open their ads on the various platforms.

title: Citra Prabuningsih
text: What a scam! Never agreed to do a monthly subscription, but they charged me anyway. I did one-time reading (as per their Ad), but my reading is never released because, surprise, surprise, I needed to pay more. So I refuse. I tried to cancel the subscription, but access was rejected. Tried to the billing tab on their menu, access rejected. Giving 1 star is too good for this channel. What if they have 0 star...

title: Michelle Frenette
text: Had the web trial and have never been able to cancel it. They just charged me 60 bucks. Beware that the trial is not easy to cancel- edited- if it was easy to do or understand u would have gotten a better rating. I have emailed the team. Have yet to hear back. I have screen shots of the issues I'm having as I can't even sign in to change anything now. Says password is wrong asked for password reset, the email never comes. Not even in spam.

title: Cameron Churchill
text: I do not like this app. Do not purchase. I completed the questionnaire quiz to find my spirit animal I clicked at the end on a subscription for $13-$14 and it successfully went through. However I $80 was taken out of my account. Two different transaction non whatsoever saying the $13-$14. Instead my bank account says one for $22.32 and the second for $48.97. Which neither even add up to their subscription and extras amounts. Scammers. Their options of customer support do not WORK!

title: Erin Florent
text: Was offered a palm reading for $1 'donation', then was unknowingly signed up for a subscription that cost more than they offer if you actually sign up for one on purpose. Then you can't cancel it through the app. Everything you try comes up with error codes. You have to go to their website and sign in there, where you are able to cancel. I was sent no emails about details or subscriptions. You don't use the word donation and then turn around and say "oh we gave you all the information".

title: Cheryl Redmond
text: I would say zero stars for sure. I the app itself is fine, however whe I canceled my subscription they continue to take nearly $60 a month out of my bank account. I go into the app which does not give me any access to any of the paid freatures (which I am still charged for) and I am not given access to the cancel subscription section of it either. So they are just stealing money from my bank even though I canceled months and months ago. I can not even contact the app. Very disappointed and 😡

title: Janylle Mason
text: This is the most ridiculous amount of ads I've ever experienced on a free app. You literally can't click ANYTHING without watching SEVERAL long videos. Good luck trying to read more than 1 section. You'll have to watch at least a minute of ads to read the 10 seconds of actual content you want to read. Before spending $60 on an app, I usually try it out first. But I will never give these people my money. They've already wasted too much of my time. I get you need to make money but this is too far.

title: Ellapen Rapiti
text: I purchased an option to get a once off reading for $1 only to discover that $13 was debited. I tried to use the cancel subscription option but it was impossible to navigate. I sent them several emails. I read the case of someone who had five deductions from her account, so I had to contact my bank to open a dispute and cancel my card. I would urge people not to subscribe to this app because once you are subscribed then getting out of it is impossible. I can't understand why companies do this!

title: Simmer Elise
text: It's great until you try to unsubscribe. I unsubscribed the day after I originally downloaded it via a chat in the app. But yesterday, they still took the money out, and my subscription was somehow active again. I have been in contact, and they did refund me. But given that I was resubscribed without my permission I do worry that this app might be a scam. Watch your accounts for at least 30 days after you unsubscribe.

title: Liz Ham
text: Inaccurate reading, probably due to the fact the reader didn't have a photo of me to read or my name so that makes it impossible to do an accurate reading, it's like trying to find something and you don't know what/where it is, so you can't focus your energy to find it. Only tried to see if it was legit and for palm reading which was mostly inaccurate too. Seems to be more for making money due to having to pay a lot for credits. Don't waste your money.

title: Gerda Wright
text: On installing and subscribing I made sure to unsubscribe from future subscribtions. Yet 5 deductions were made from my personal account. The 1st 4 I believe was my own mistake in misunderstanding how the app works. But the 5th deduction was made nearly 2 weeks after. I went back to the website to make sure my subscription was cancelled. The process of subscription cancelation and refund is very difficult. You supply info. But they keep asking for more info, never resolving the issue.

title: Kelly-Anne Rose
text: ***Edit*** I emailed support with my issues and it's probably the quickest response I've had in a long time, and they very kindly resolved them so I've updated my review. Somehow managed to subscribe n had over £60 out of my account in less than a month but I only wanted to pay £5 initially when I installed just to get taster but it's very confusing app to navigate and obviously expensive.

title: K0sity S
text: Says there is a free personal reading, but the app wouldn't send my question until the 3 minutes was almost up, the person on the other end kept the chat open even though I clearly was unable to respond, which they mentioned multiple times, and still they let the time all run out with no conversation at all from my end then when the question did finally go through, their reply came after the 3 min was over and it won't allow me to open it without paying.

title: Lakshika Mampitiya
text: DO NOT INSTALL THIS APP! I signed up for a free trial, but instead of getting a trial period, I was immediately charged for 3 months without any warning or notification. It's like they deliberately set up their payment system to trick users into paying before they even realized what is happening. Refunds? Forget it. They will never do that and ask to contact Google support. AVOID at all costs unless you want to lose your hard-earned money.

title: Vlad Dumitrica
text: The connection with the advisor disconnects too many times, leading to frustration while waiting to reconnect or until they become available again. Very different UI and pricing options if you reinstall the app on the same or a new device. The last time I purchased credits I didn't get the extra credits they advertised. I'm starting to lose the trust in had in this service.

title: Amy A
text: I thought I had managed to cancel my subscription last month but PayPal notified me that I'd been charged another US$39. I downloaded the app again and went to the 'how to cancel your subscription' tab, nothing happened. I then went to the 'billing' tab and got an 'error, unable to load, please try again' message repeatedly. I also tried cancelling through google apps to no avail. This app is a scam, I just want my money back or at the very least, not to be charged for a service I no longer use.

title: Christian Smith
text: It's all in the small print. I paid a dollar to chat with an advisor, and it costs like 100 credits a minute, and they were so slow that I didn't even get a reading. So I deleted it and now like 6 or 7 days later I get charged $55 and had to call my bank aboit it because i didnt have any subscriptions or anything. Turns out that $1 was actually a subscription and the only way for you to know that is by checking at the bottom of an email they send you. This should be taken down.

title: Melissa Prince
text: I just downloaded this app and was very excited. But getting an ad every time you click to read something is ridiculous. I even had two ads in a row. I get you have to pay people, but the customer experience is really important. And right now, it is not a good one. There are a lot of apps out there that contain ads, but at least they let you interact with the app for a few minutes before showing an ad!

title: Daniela Ivanna Maria Garcia Almodovar
text: I don't usually rate apps but this one definitely deserves one. They are scammers, Do not sign in. I wish someone had told me this before I signed in, they will talk about how great they are when their app gets your information wrong 100%, you might try to correct it only to see that the app didn't save the changes you made even if you saved them, ones you close the app and log in again, surprise! The changes are gone. If you are thinking about the free trial, PLEASE DON'T, they will charge 80€

title: Morgan Payne
text: SUPER shady app, DON'T download or give your payment details to them. Paid 85p ($1) for a trial with them and they said that they would remind me when the trial was up but they didn't and I have been charged £30! I didn't get the service that I asked for (palm reading) and the prices are WAYY too high in general. Whenever you want to get anything through this app they just tell you to chat to one of their psychics because apparently this app is incapable of doing what it was designed for.

title: Kala MQ
text: Update: I contacted customer service and although it took some effort to explain that I skipped all the offers and it was a site's error, they completed a refund. So my star goes to CS, they're efficient and expedite to solve conflicts. The app didn't work for me (just displayed a black screen) so I uninstall it ///This program looks like a scam. I just paid the 7 days trial at the selected price, and then they charged me extra $20 for I don't even know why... I don't recommend this company.
